channel.title: +परम्परा on आगमे ब्राह्मे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +परम्परा on आगमे ब्राह्मे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: MaNDana vs sureshvara
item.description:
Mandana knows Shankara but not vice-versa and is writing after him to refute him. Sureshvara and Mandana are quite clearly 2 different people.
sureshvara refers to Mandana in vartika. Sureshvara doesn’t name him but Anandajnana says he is referring to Mandana Mishra.
Source: TW
Source: TW

brahmasiddhi was an independent work, and overshadowed shankara till 10th CE (TW).
